goals.title: Story 1: Add tests-first hardening fixtures for Live Preview selectio...
goals.objective: Story 1: Add tests-first hardening fixtures for Live Preview selection/mapping, exact canonical Markdown clipboard/source extraction expectations, and viewport/performance boundedness. Use the PRD and test spec acceptance criteria. Keep the tests deterministic under Vitest/happy-dom.
goals.evidence: Added tests-first Pass 6 hardening fixtures: tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts, tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts, and tests/editor-live-preview-performance-fixtures.test.ts. Verification intentionally fails before implementation: pnpm vitest run those 3 files fails because source-text helper is missing and task projection does not yet cover visible ranges inside task text.

goals.title: Story 2: Introduce a private block renderer contract/helper under pac...
goals.objective: Story 2: Introduce a private block renderer contract/helper under packages/editor/src/live-preview that adapts into the existing InternalLivePreviewRenderer/widget-renderer flow. It must not create a parallel decoration pipeline and must preserve collectLivePreviewWidgetRangesForVisibleRanges scan-window/dedupe semantics.
goals.evidence: Introduced private live-preview block renderer helpers in packages/editor/src/live-preview/block-renderers.ts and source extraction helper in packages/editor/src/live-preview/source-text.ts; adapted through existing InternalLivePreviewRenderer/widget flow with tests in tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts. Preserved visible-range scan/dedupe semantics by reusing the existing widget collection path and line scan window in extension.ts. Verification: pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck; pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-performance-fixtures.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts (8 files/65 tests passed).

goals.title: Story 3: Port or wrap existing fenced code block and callout widgets...
goals.objective: Story 3: Port or wrap existing fenced code block and callout widgets through the private block renderer contract without behavior changes. Keep code-block and callout renderer ids, source reveal behavior, safe DOM, widget suppression, ordering, and desktop style behavior intact.
goals.evidence: Ported existing fenced code block and callout widgets in packages/editor/src/live-preview/renderers.ts through the private LivePreviewBlockRenderer adapter while preserving renderer ids, classes, activation ranges/source reveal behavior, widget construction, suppression behavior, and default widget renderer ordering. Verification: pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck; pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-performance-fixtures.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts (8 files/65 tests passed).

goals.title: Story 4: Enforce public/private boundaries and scope constraints. New...
goals.objective: Story 4: Enforce public/private boundaries and scope constraints. New block renderer helpers must not leak through packages/editor/src/index.ts, packages/editor/src/live-preview/index.ts, or packages/platform-api/src/index.ts. Do not add public plugin APIs, tables, properties, Reading parity, broad parser migration, product-visible calendar/timeline blocks, or new dependencies.
goals.evidence: Enforced Pass 6 scope boundaries: private block/source helpers are not exported through packages/editor/src/index.ts, packages/editor/src/live-preview/index.ts, or packages/platform-api/src/index.ts; no package dependency files changed; no public plugin API, parser migration, table/properties/reading-parity feature, or product-visible calendar/timeline block was added. Evidence: rg found helper usage only in private live-preview files/tests; tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts covers public boundary assertions. Verification: pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts (4 tests passed); pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck.

goals.title: Story 5: Verify and finalize. Run the targeted Live Preview gate, edi...
goals.objective: Story 5: Verify and finalize. Run the targeted Live Preview gate, editor typecheck, import-boundary lint, final cleanup pass, independent code review, final quality gate, and commit changed files with a plain descriptive commit message.
goals.evidence: G008-story-5-verify-and-finalize-run-the completed for .omx/ultragoal/goals.json and .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl. Final Pass 6 implementation and validation/review evidence: private Live Preview block foundation added with adapter-only block-renderers helper, exact source extraction helper, code-block/callout widget wrapping through the private contract, line-window internal projection for task markers, and tests-first selection/clipboard/performance/boundary fixtures. Verification passed: targeted 8-file Vitest gate (65 tests), @zorid/editor typecheck, lint:boundaries, and biome ci. AI slop cleanup completed with no fallback-like findings and one boundary cleanup. Independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR.
